creator: t.masub@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 185150
dnstap build option patch

The option to enable the dnstap query module has been changed in version 2.5.
I will attach a patch to respond to this change.

Quoted from Knot DNS document:
> The --enable-dnstap configure option now enables the dnstap support in kdig only! To build the dnstap query module, --with-module-dnstap have to be used.

Reference: https://www.knot-dns.cz/docs/2.5/html/migration.html
